subtitle: Limits a board is checked against on import.

confirmDelete.title: Delete machine?
confirmDelete.message: This machine will be removed from the library.

maxPanelWidth.label: Max panel width
maxPanelWidth.help: Largest blank that fits the machine work area. A bigger board can't be made in one pass (exposure or CNC).

maxPanelHeight.label: Max panel height
maxPanelHeight.help: The other side of the work area. The board is compared against it (accounting for rotation if allowed).

allowRotate.label: Try 90° rotation
allowRotate.help: If the board doesn't fit as-is, try rotating it 90° before declaring it too big.

toolingClampRadius.label: Tooling clamp field
toolingClampRadius.help: Forbidden margin around registration/flip holes — no board may sit there. 0 disables.

maxCopperLayers.label: Max copper layers
maxCopperLayers.help: How many copper layers you can actually make (usually 1–2 at home).

allowInner.label: Allow inner layers
allowInner.help: Allow boards with inner copper layers (4+). Not available for DIY.

minTrace.label: Min trace width
minTrace.help: The thinnest trace the process reproduces. Thinner risks breaks or non-printing.

minSpace.label: Min clearance
minSpace.help: Minimum gap between different nets. Less and adjacent traces merge (short).

ignoreBelow.label: Ignore below
ignoreBelow.help: Copper/clearance/mask defects thinner than this are treated as compute artefacts (degenerate slivers) and hidden. Default 0.05 mm (50 µm).

minDrill.label: Min hole size
minDrill.help: The smallest hole you're willing to make. Separate from the bit set — your lower bound on hole diameter.

drillBitTolerance.label: Bit snap tolerance
drillBitTolerance.help: How far a hole diameter may differ from a bit to count as matched.

minAnnular.label: Min annular ring
minAnnular.help: Minimum copper ring around a hole. Narrow and the drill wanders into the pad edge or breaks out.

viaPlating.label: Via plating available
viaPlating.help: Whether holes can be plated. If not, vias are made by hand and their count matters.

viaMaxDiameter.label: Via — max diameter
viaMaxDiameter.help: Holes no larger than this count as vias for the counting heuristic.

viaWarn.label: Via — warn threshold
viaWarn.help: How many un-plated vias are acceptable before a warning (each plated by hand).

viaBlock.label: Via — block threshold
viaBlock.help: How many un-plated vias make the board practically infeasible.

minMaskDam.label: Min mask dam
minMaskDam.help: Minimum soldermask dam between adjacent openings. Thinner won't print.

minSilkLine.label: Min silk line
minSilkLine.help: Minimum silkscreen line/text width. Thinner disappears in print.

maxOvershoot.label: Max overshoot
maxOvershoot.help: How far layer features may stick out past the board outline. More and something hangs off the edge.

cnc.safeZHelp: How far to lift above the board surface (work zero) for safe traverses — used by both the drilling G-code and manual control.
cnc.machineSafeZHelp: Maximum retract height in machine coordinates (G53): the tool never rises above it. Must be ≤ 0 — a little below the top limit switch.
cnc.toolChangeZHelp: Work-coordinate retract height for a manual bit swap — higher than the travel safe-Z so there's room for your hands.

toolChangeZWarn.below-safe: Tool-change Z must be at least the travel safe-Z, with room to swap the bit.
toolChangeZWarn.over-travel: Tool-change Z is higher than the Z travel — the spindle can't reach it.

cnc.hasProbeHelp: Whether a Z touch-off probe is connected. With a probe, each tool change re-zeroes Z by touching the bit to the plate; without it, you set Z by hand.
cnc.probeFeedHelp: Feed rate of the G38.2 probe move toward the surface.
cnc.probeMaxDistHelp: Max downward travel of the probe before giving up (no contact). On the first tool change Z descends the full Z travel instead.
cnc.probePlateOffsetHelp: Thickness of the touch-off plate, added to the Z zero. 0 if probing the copper foil directly.
